input_image.title: ImageData
input_image.description: The input image to animate. Will be resized to target dimensions.
input_image.format: Gradio File Input - a http or https url to a file

last_image.title: ImageData
last_image.description: The optional last image for the video.
last_image.format: Gradio File Input - a http or https url to a file

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired animation or motion.
prompt.default: make this image come alive, cinematic motion, smooth animation

steps.description: Number of inference steps. More steps = higher quality but slower.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to avoid unwanted elements.
negative_prompt.default:
色调艳丽, 过曝, 静态, 细节模糊不清, 字幕, 风格, 作品, 画作, 画面, 静止, 整体发灰, 最差质量, 低质量, JPEG压缩残留, 丑陋的, 残缺的, 多余的手指,
画得不好的手部, 画得不好的脸部, 畸形的, 毁容的, 形态畸形的肢体, 手指融合, 静止不动的画面, 杂乱的背景, 三条腿, 背景人很多, 倒着走

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds.

guidance_scale.description: Controls adherence to the prompt. Higher values = more adherence.

guidance_scale_2.description: Controls adherence to the prompt. Higher values = more adherence.

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible results. Defaults to 42.

randomize_seed.description: Whether to use a random seed instead of the provided seed.

quality.description: Video output quality. Default is 5. Uses variable bit rate.

scheduler.description: The name of the scheduler to use for inference. Defaults to "UniPCMultistep".

flow_shift.description: The flow shift value for compatible schedulers. Defaults to 6.0.

frame_multiplier.description: The int value for fps enhancer
